query:
SELECT 'pipelines' as entity, COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(DISTINCT name) as unique_names FROM pipelines WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'contacts', COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT email) FROM contacts WHERE tenantId = 1 AND deletedAt IS NULL AND email IS NOT NULL AND email != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'deals', COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT title) FROM deals WHERE tenantId = 1 AND deletedAt IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'accounts', COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT name) FROM accounts WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'crm_tasks', COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT title) FROM crm_tasks WHERE tenantId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'crm_users', COUNT(*), 0 FROM crm_users WHERE tenantId = 1
